title: Unique 32080EU Eco-Friendly Paper Plates-23 cm-Black Colour-16 Count (Pack of 1), Pack of 16
features: Paper plates measure approximately 23 cm in diameter
Ideal for serving food at a birthday party, graduation or Halloween party
Combine with other black party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Your special occasions, dinner parties, and last-minute get-togethers just got a little easier with our eco-friendly black paper plates. This affordable pack of black paper plates is a convenient way to add some stylish black colour to your birthday party, graduation party, Halloween party, and more. These disposable plates also make cleaning up after the party is over really quick and easy. As these plates are 100% plastic free, the great news is they are better for the environment too! Safety Warning No warning applicable
